_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for pages/support/bookex-overview.html. Drives a single-card / sections-within layout via render_bookex_overview.py.
_meta.crossRefNote: Linked from the BookEx nav dropdown ('BookEx Overview' entry). The chapter table here is informational; the per-chapter BookEx pages (pages/bookex/BookExCH02.html etc.) are rendered separately by render_bookex.py from pages/bookex/json/.

card.subBanner: Practice Problems to Prepare You for Labs

paragraphs_html: Book Exercises (BookEx) are short practice problems from your Gaddis textbook. They’re designed to help you master individual concepts before applying them in your lab assignments.
Think of them as warm-ups before the big game. Each BookEx isolates a specific skill—variables, loops, functions—so you can practice without the complexity of a full project.

callout.title: Key Insight
callout.body_html: When you’re stuck on a lab, go back to the relevant BookEx. The patterns you practiced there are the same patterns you need in your lab!

workflow.label: The BookEx Workflow
steps_html: Open the BookEx assignment sheet for that chapter
Use the patterns you learned in your lab assignment!

chapters.label: Chapters 2–10

rows.concepts_html: Functions, parameters, return values, random module

rows.meaning_html: Does your code produce the correct output?
Did you use the required techniques?
